changes.before: The silence had weight because every place like this ought to have been full of useless little sounds.
changes.after: Only the little sounds that should have had company remained.

changes.before: Interrupted, Sylvanas thought. Not emptied cleanly. Interrupted.
changes.after: Interrupted. Not cleared.

changes.before: That absence kept sharpening instead of dulling.
changes.after: The absence sharpened the more houses she crossed.

changes.before: That was almost worse than the cattle.
changes.after: Removed for tighter forward motion.

changes.before: Something taught to imitate food after forgetting what food was for.
changes.after: The wrong sweetness Jaina had named at the pass.

changes.before: That was new enough to matter. Sylvanas filed it.
changes.after: That mattered.

changes.before: She had trackers. She had rangers. She did not have this. She could dislike that fact later.
changes.after: Compressed to the concrete discovery that the whole village answered the same way.

changes.before: One place where something had gone down hard enough to leave a shoulder-shape in the earth...
changes.after: One place where a body had gone down hard enough to leave a shoulder in the earth...

changes.before: Not a clean column of tracks. Too much overlap... Not panicked flight. Not villagers loading carts.
changes.after: Not a clean column of tracks... Feet that dragged, crossed, wandered, then found one pull and followed it.

changes.before: Sensible, for once.
changes.after: Jaina stopped at the edge of the churn and stayed out of it.

changes.before: I'm reading where the pressure is strongest in what they disturbed. The older churn has had longer to settle.
changes.after: I'm reading what they disturbed. The older churn had time to settle.

changes.before: Missing from the houses. Missing from the yards. Missing from the cattle paths...
changes.after: Removed; the evidence already lived in the search details and track count.

changes.before: Not loud. Not dramatic. Wood knocked softly against wood...
changes.after: Wood knocking softly against wood. A scrape. Then stillness...

changes.before: voice pitched lower than usual, quick edges filed off
changes.after: voice lower than usual

changes.before: She made a sound like an animal in a trap and tried to go backward.
changes.after: She made one trapped sound and tried to go backward.

changes.before: His voice had none of the field in it now. No soldier. No ranger.
changes.after: No field in his voice now.

changes.before: There would be no clean questioning... they needed something firmer than churn and absence.
changes.after: There would be no clean questioning. They still needed more than churn and empty houses.

changes.before: Worthless. Sylvanas changed angle.
changes.after: Removed; the sharper question does the work.

changes.before: Sylvanas kept her own voice flat, something to push against instead of drown in.
changes.after: Removed; her clipped questioning carries the control.

changes.before: Cyndia made a tiny sound, filing it.
changes.after: Cyndia made a tiny sound beside them.

changes.before: Then the road showed its memory.
changes.after: The road looked ordinary until the crystal took on its underglow. Then it looked used up.

changes.before: That settled what had already settled in Sylvanas's mind.
changes.after: The village dead had not vanished. They had moved north in a body.

changes.before: Useful, then ruined by conversation. A pity.
changes.after: Useful, then ruined by speech.

changes.before: Surprise. Confusion. Then the flat shock of a man who had left home thinking of axle grease and supper and found death waiting for him instead.
changes.after: Surprise. Confusion. Then flat shock.

changes.before: Nothing like this. Again, honest enough.
changes.after: Cut the evaluative gloss; kept the factual answer.

changes.before: Still not proof. Still no more than a thread. Sylvanas took it and left it unknotted.
changes.after: Reduced to the concrete lead in Paret's testimony.

changes.before: Useful. Practical. Precisely what a frightened local ought to say.
changes.after: Removed to keep Paret reading as an ordinary witness, not an exposed threat.

changes.before: Too soft on keep... a tug on a thread she could not see the far end of. Not enough.
changes.after: The farewell still sat a little oddly in her ears.

changes.before: Silence flowed back into the square after them...
changes.after: Silence flowed back into the square, thinner now for lacking horses and people...

changes.before: A life interrupted badly enough that the whole place held itself around the missing end of it.
changes.after: A life stopped so badly the whole place had frozen around it.

flags: Line 523: Paret's farewell was kept lightly odd as a continuity breadcrumb, but the surrounding suspicion-gloss was stripped back.
Line 391: Formal wording inside the written warning slip was kept because it is an in-world dispatch, not spoken scene prose.
Canon check: Sylvanas/Jaina role references plus Quel'Thalas and Silvermoon geography read canon-safe for this chapter.
